title: get api health returns service status ok
description: Test GET /api/health endpoint to verify it returns 200 status with JSON containing status ok, service name Creator Skill Backend, and version 1.0.0.

title: post api v1 generate skill with short content returns validation error
description: Test POST /api/v1/generate-skill with creator_content shorter than 40 characters to receive 422 Pydantic validation error with type string_too_short and loc [body, creator_content].

title: post api v2 generate skill twitter with empty username returns validation error
description: Test POST /api/v2/generate-skill/twitter with empty twitter_username to receive 422 Pydantic validation error due to min_length=1 constraint.

title: post api v2 generate skill youtube with empty url list returns validation error
description: Test POST /api/v2/generate-skill/youtube with empty youtube_urls list to receive 422 Pydantic validation error with type too_short.

title: post api v1 generate skill stream with short content returns validation error
description: Test POST /api/v1/generate-skill/stream with creator_content shorter than 40 characters to receive 422 Pydantic validation error. This tests that the SSE streaming endpoint enforces the same validation as the non-streaming endpoint.

title: post api v2 generate skill stream with short content returns validation error
description: Test POST /api/v2/generate-skill/stream with creator_content shorter than 40 characters to receive 422 Pydantic validation error. This tests the v2 streaming endpoint validation.

title: post api v2 generate skill twitter stream with empty username returns validation error
description: Test POST /api/v2/generate-skill/twitter/stream with empty twitter_username to receive 422 Pydantic validation error. This tests that the SSE twitter streaming endpoint enforces the same input validation as the non-streaming twitter endpoint.

title: post api v2 generate skill youtube stream with empty url list returns validation error
description: Test POST /api/v2/generate-skill/youtube/stream with empty youtube_urls list to receive 422 Pydantic validation error. This tests that the SSE youtube streaming endpoint enforces the same validation.

title: get api v1 skills returns list of generated skills
description: Test GET /api/v1/skills to verify it returns 200 with JSON containing skills array and count. Each skill should have name, has_skill_md, file_count, and files metadata.

title: get api v1 skills skill name returns skill detail with files
description: Test GET /api/v1/skills/{skill_name} with an existing skill name to receive 200 response with full skill details including files array containing relative_path and content.

title: delete api v1 skills nonexistent returns 404
description: Test DELETE /api/v1/skills/nonexistent-skill-xyz-999 to receive 404 with detail containing not found.

title: get api v1 export skill zip returns zip archive
description: Test GET /api/v1/export/{skill_name}/zip with a valid existing skill_name to receive 200 response with application/zip content-type.

title: get api v1 export with path traversal returns 400 error
description: Test GET /api/v1/export/..%2F..%2Fetc/passwd to verify PathTraversalGuard middleware blocks the request with 400 Invalid path error.

title: post api v2 generate skill twitter stream nonexistent user returns 502
description: Test POST /api/v2/generate-skill/twitter/stream with twitter_username xyznonexistent999 to receive 502 error from X API indicating user not found.

title: post api v2 generate skill youtube stream with invalid url returns 400
description: Test POST /api/v2/generate-skill/youtube/stream with youtube_urls containing a single invalid URL like https://not-a-youtube-url.com/watch to receive 400 error.
